Anatomy: A highly detailed, professional medical illustration of {keywords}. Labeled diagram style, white background, clean lines, textbook quality, accurate anatomical proportions. 4k resolution.
Pathology_Gross: A realistic medical illustration showing the gross pathology of {keywords}. Macro view, educational focus, clear distinction of pathological tissues, neutral background.
Radiograph: A simulated high-fidelity medical imaging scan (X-ray/CT/MRI) showing {keywords}. Grayscale, high contrast, radiological standard view, clear pathology indication.
Histology: A simulated H&E stained histological slide of {keywords}. Microscopic view, cellular details, pink and purple staining pattern, high magnification.
Clinical_Photo: A realistic clinical illustration of a patient presenting with {keywords}. Focus on physical signs, neutral medical setting, educational purpose.
Physics_Diagram: A clear, flat 2D educational vector diagram explaining {keywords}. Physics textbook style, white background, distinct arrows representing forces or rays, schematic representation, easy to understand, high contrast.
Physics_Graph: A high-quality scientific graph or chart showing {keywords}. Clear X and Y axes, sharp lines, educational context, white background, minimal text clutter.
Equipment_Structure: A technical cross-section diagram of {keywords} (e.g., CT gantry, X-ray tube). Engineering schematic style, showing internal components, metallic textures, neutral background.
Imaging_Artifact: A simulated medical image (CT/MRI/X-ray) explicitly demonstrating the {keywords} artifact. The image should show the specific noise, streak, or distortion characteristic of this artifact for educational diagnosis.
MRI_Pulse_Sequence: A timing diagram of an MRI pulse sequence showing {keywords}. Horizontal time axis, RF pulses, Gradient lines (Gx, Gy, Gz), clear signal evolution, textbook diagram style.
QC_Phantom: A high-contrast image of a radiology quality control phantom showing {keywords}. Test pattern style, resolution bars, grayscale gradients, technical reference image.
Default: A high-quality medical illustration of {keywords}, educational style, white background.
